intent: Sweep fixture (MED) for 1s_2br_wd_side_split_baths_cl_ld -- 12x10 m lot, 48 m2 buildable floor (6 m buildable depth). Published minimum for this topology (true floor ~11.9x10) -- deep enough for the living/dining/kitchen 3-room stack, unlike the gr sibling's 11x9 shallow-depth min which this topology can't reach. Same lot as its briefs/test/ canonical brief.
